top_insights: Stop waiting for a savior; the rescue fantasy is the only thing keeping you poor.
True wealth isn't earned by following rules, but by rewriting the ones you don't like.
The smartest people ignore degrees and master the hidden mechanics of their industry.
Narrative control beats raw talent; whoever tells the story wins the market.
Institutions don't save you; they extract value from those who believe they will.
hook_patterns: Contrarian statements challenging common beliefs or norms
Insightful revelations about hidden mechanisms or elite behaviors
Personal anecdotes establishing unique authority or exclusive access
emotional_drivers: Validation of the audience's skepticism or alternative worldview
Aspiration toward high status, wealth, and autonomy
Relief from the pressure of needing external approval or rescue
emerging_narrative: A shift toward radical self-reliance and skepticism of traditional institutions, where success is defined by personal agency, financial independence, and the ability to uncover or control the narrative rather than waiting for systemic solutions.

viral_examples.author: Codie_Sanchez
viral_examples.text: I have a friend who used to work for 2 billionaires after all he's seen he said to me, "I wish you not one penny over $299 million. Reality gets completely lost somewhere after that." I think about that sometimes.

viral_examples.author: naval
viral_examples.text: Elon’s stance is principled. Trump’s stance is practical. Tech needs Republicans for the present. Republicans need Tech for the future. Drop the tax cuts, cut some pork, get the bill through.

viral_examples.author: naval
viral_examples.text: The smartest people are all self-taught, even if they went to school.

viral_examples.author: naval
viral_examples.text: Panic led to lockdowns. Lockdowns led to fiscal stimulus. Stimulus led to inflation. Inflation led to monetary tightening. Tightening leads to recession. The panic wasn’t free - and the bill is coming due.

viral_examples.author: thedankoe
viral_examples.text: Normalize not having an opinion on things you don’t understand.

winning_patterns: Contrarian statements challenging common beliefs or norms
Insightful revelations about hidden mechanisms or elite behaviors
Personal anecdotes establishing unique authority or exclusive access
